name: meetifyy-monorepo
description: Meetifyy Monorepo Root - Start backend, main frontend, and admin frontend in one command

scripts.build: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push && npm run start:prod
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN" -c "blue.bold,magenta.bold,yellow.bold" "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix admin-frontend run dev"
